title: ci: fix two issues, remove unused exceptions
body:
This fixes ~~one~~ two issues caught by staticcheck, and removes two exception presets from .golangci.yml. See commits for details.

Makes sense to merge this one before #25874.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
none
```

comments.body: https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/25874 is merged, might be best to rebase this to see if any new issues show up.
